errors.frontmatter_too_large: Front matter exceeds size limit in {path} ({size} bytes, limit {limit})
errors.alias_collision: Component alias "{alias}" collides with an existing binding in {path}
errors.component_multiline_output: Component "{alias}" returned multiline output (single line required)
errors.server_context_on_client: serverContext is not allowed with renderClient

warnings.circular_include: Circular reference detected; skipped {path} (referenced from {from} via {via})
warnings.nest_limit_exceeded: Nesting limit exceeded ({limit}); skipped block in {path}
warnings.extend_in_component: extend is not allowed inside a component; skipped in {path}
warnings.prop_type_mismatch: Prop "{prop}" type mismatch in component "{component}"; expected {expected}, got {actual}
warnings.prop_missing: Required prop "{prop}" is missing for component "{component}"
warnings.prop_unknown: Unknown prop "{prop}" passed to component "{component}"; ignored
